display.purpose: Hero page headings on the world select screen. Single-use; only one display heading per page.

body.purpose: All reading text, lesson content, page descriptions. Cap line length at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: HUD metadata readouts in Press Start 2P: player rank, level number, XP count, order badges.

shadows.name: card-shadow
shadows.purpose: Resting shadow for all cards, nav links, and secondary buttons. The inset highlight creates the CRT phosphor glow.

shadows.name: card-shadow-hover
shadows.purpose: Lifted state for hovered cards. The highlight brightens and the drop shadow deepens.

shadows.name: dropdown-shadow
shadows.purpose: Deepest shadow in the system. Used for the search dropdown.

shadows.name: lesson-card-shadow
shadows.purpose: The reading pane - deep and wide but soft.

shadows.name: pill-shadow
shadows.purpose: Fixed-position pills (lesson back link, lesson read badge).

shadows.name: hierarchy-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: Colored ambient glow ring on hover. X is replaced with course/category/section depending on hierarchy depth.

shadows.name: search-focus-glow
shadows.purpose: Focus ring for the search input.

motion.name: ease-default
motion.purpose: Default transition timing for border-color, background, box-shadow, and color changes.

motion.name: ease-progress
motion.purpose: Standard ease-out curve for progress bar width transitions and extended animations.

motion.name: duration-level-up
motion.purpose: Level-up animation duration for avatar pulse, title flash, and badge scale.

components.name: Card (Default)
components.description: The fundamental container. 3px chunky border with CRT inner glow highlight.
components.html:
WORLD

ML System Design

12 levels
components.css: .ds-card { position: relative; background: #161922; border: 3px solid #2a2f45; border-radius: 4px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.04), 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease; cursor: pointer; z-index: 0; } .ds-card::after { content: ''; position: absolute; z-index: -1; inset: 0; border-radius: inherit; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.01) 0%, transparent 40%); pointer-events: none; } .ds-card:hover { background: #1f2335; border-color: #3d4470; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.06), 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 0 1px #3d4470; transform: translateY(-3px); }

components.name: Card (Category - Purple Glow)
components.description: Category card at the world level. Hover triggers purple ambient glow.
components.html:
AB Testing

6 quests
components.css: .ds-card-category { position: relative; background: #161922; border: 3px solid #2a2f45; border-radius: 4px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.04), 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease; cursor: pointer; z-index: 0; } .ds-card-category::after { content: ''; position: absolute; z-index: -1; inset: 0; border-radius: inherit; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.01) 0%, transparent 40%); pointer-events: none; } .ds-card-category:hover { background: #1f2335; border-color: #a78bfa; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 0 0 1px rgba(96,165,250,0.3), 0 0 32px rgba(167,139,250,0.2); transform: translateY(-3px); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: System-wide secondary button style. Used for lesson source links.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-secondary"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#60a5fa" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="vertical-align: middle; margin-right: 6px;"><path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"/><polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"/><line x1="10" y1="14" x2="21" y2="3"/></svg>View source</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; width: 100%; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #60a5fa; background: #161922; border: 2px solid #2a2f45; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.04), 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s, box-shadow 0.2s ease; text-decoration: none; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #60a5fa; background: #1f2335; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 0 0 1px rgba(96,165,250,0.3); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Search field with icon, focus glow, and dropdown.
components.css: .ds-input-wrapper { position: relative; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 9px 14px 9px 36px; font-size: 0.88rem; color: #e0e4ec; background: #161922; border: none; border-radius: 6px; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-input:focus { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(96,165,250,0.15); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9aa3b8; }

components.name: XP Badge
components.description: Quest XP reward indicator in pixel font. Read-only.
components.css: .ds-xp-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 1px; font-family: 'Press Start 2P', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; color: #fbbf24; } .ds-xp-badge__label { font-size: 0.6rem; }

components.name: Order Badge
components.description: Quest order number in pixel font on a dark badge.
components.css: .ds-order-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 6px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid #2a2f45; color: #9aa3b8; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Press Start 2P', monospace; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Player HUD
components.description: Player status display in the top nav. Avatar, rank, XP bar, level, XP count.
components.html:
NOVICE
Lv.31,250 XP
components.css: .ds-hud { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-shrink: 0; min-width: 250px; } .ds-hud__avatar { width: 45px; height: 45px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0; border: 2px solid #60a5fa; box-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(96,165,250,0.15); } .ds-hud__info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; min-width: 0; flex: 1; } .ds-hud__title { font-family: 'Press Start 2P', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; color: #f0f4fc; letter-spacing: 0.03em; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-hud__xp-bar { width: 100%; height: 5px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 1px solid #2a2f45; border-radius: 2px; margin: 1px 0; overflow: hidden; } .ds-hud__xp-fill { height: 100%; background: #34d399; border-radius: 1px; transition: width 0.5s ease; } .ds-hud__stats { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; } .ds-hud__lvl { font-family: 'Press Start 2P', monospace; font-size: 0.6rem; color: #60a5fa; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-hud__xp-count { font-family: 'Press Start 2P', monospace; font-size: 0.6rem; color: #34d399; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Lesson Nav Link
components.description: Lesson pagination link at the bottom of lesson pages.
components.css: .ds-lesson-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; text-decoration: none; border: 2px solid #2a2f45; border-radius: 4px; background: #161922; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.04), 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); color: #e0e4ec; font-size: 0.9rem; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; cursor: pointer; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-lesson-nav:hover { border-color: #fbbf24; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 0 0 1px rgba(251,191,36,0.2); } .ds-lesson-nav__order { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 24px; height: 24px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #e0e4ec; background: rgba(251,191,36,0.08); border: 1px solid #2a2f45; border-radius: 6px; flex-shrink: 0; font-family: 'Press Start 2P', monospace; transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; } .ds-lesson-nav:hover .ds-lesson-nav__order { background: rgba(251,191,36,0.08); border-color: rgba(251,191,36,0.2); color: #fbbf24; } .ds-lesson-nav__title { flex: 1; min-width: 0; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Back Link
components.description: Inline back link to the parent page.
components.html: Back to AB Testing
components.css: .ds-back-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; color: #60a5fa; font-size: 0.9rem; margin-top: 24px; transition: color 0.15s ease; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; } .ds-back-link:hover { color: #93c5fd; }

narrative.overview: System Overflow is a CRT-lit game console for self-guided learning. Every surface evokes the feel of a booting system: a dark void of deepest navy-black, layered panels that catch faint inner highlights like glass over an old monitor, and accent colors that glow with the energy of player stats. This system explicitly rejects SaaS-dashboard sterility, corporate blues, glassmorphism as default, and the hero-metric template. It is not a tool; it is a console you sit down at.
keyCharacteristics: Console-dark. The palette lives in the deep end: backgrounds at #0d0f14, surfaces climbing through subtle brightness steps. No true black, no true white.
Glow as hierarchy. Purple, green, and gold glows signal your depth in the content tree (world > level > quest). The accent tells you what you can interact with.
Tactile response. Cards lift 3px on hover. Borders shift from muted scanline-gray to the level's glow color. Shadows deepen. Everything responds.
Occasional pixel. Press Start 2P is reserved for HUD metadata only -- the machine's internal readout. Never for body text.
3px borders. The card language is deliberately chunky. Not subtle 1px strokes; tangible borders that separate surfaces with intention.

rules.name: The Glow-as-Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Purple, green, and gold are not decoration. They encode your position in the content tree. A card glowing purple means you are at the world level. Gold means this is a quest within a level. Never apply a hierarchy glow outside its tree depth.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Power-Up Blue is the only interactive accent. Hierarchy colors (purple, green, gold) signal where you are, not what you can click.

rules.name: The Pixel-Restriction Rule
rules.body: Press Start 2P is only for HUD-like readouts: player rank, level number, XP count, order badges, and page-header hierarchy badges. Never for body text, headings, navigation, or instructional copy.

rules.name: The One-H1 Rule
rules.body: Only one display or headline heading per page. The hierarchy is a path, not a menu.

rules.name: The Lift-on-Hover Rule
rules.body: Every interactive surface gains elevation on hover. The hover lift is 3px translateY on category cards, deeper shadows on all cards, and brighter borders throughout. Resting surfaces are flat; only interaction triggers depth.

rules.name: The No-Stacked-Surface Rule
rules.body: Never nest a card inside a card. Tonal layering happens across distinct UI elements, never as parent-child containment.

dos: Do use the 3px card border. It is the signature structural element of the system.
Do tint every neutral toward the navy-blue hue (oklch hue ~270).
Do reserve Press Start 2P for HUD metadata only.
Do apply hierarchy glows (purple > green > gold) by tree depth.
Do use the CRT inner highlight on every elevated surface.
Do let cards lift 3px on hover.
Do keep Power-Up Blue as the sole interactive accent.
donts: Don't use true black (#000) or true white (#fff).
Don't use glassmorphism as a default surface treatment.
Don't replace Power-Up Blue with a hierarchy color for interactive elements.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't add bounce or elastic easings.
Don't animate width, height, top, left, or margin.
